name: Zeta Reticulant
name_jp: ゼータ・レティキュラント
desc: You can Tribute 1 "Eva Token" to Special Summon this card from your hand. While this card is in your Graveyard, each time a monster(s) your opponent controls is removed from play, Special Summon 1 "Eva Token" (Fiend-Type/DARK/Level 2/ATK 500/DEF 500).
mnst_eff: You can Tribute 1 "Eva Token" to Special Summon this card from your hand. While this card is in your Graveyard, each time a monster(s) your opponent controls is removed from play, Special Summon 1 "Eva Token" (Fiend-Type/DARK/Level 2/ATK 500/DEF 500).
eff: You can Tribute 1 "Eva Token" to Special Summon this card from your hand. While this card is in your Graveyard, each time a monster(s) your opponent controls is removed from play, Special Summon 1 "Eva Token" (Fiend-Type/DARK/Level 2/ATK 500/DEF 500).

jp_sets.set: Duelist Road -Piece of Memory- Side: Yami Yugi

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
